title: Passing Time
excerpt: Occasionally while traveling, I will find myself with some down time and no internet access. Highly dependent upon my gadgets, I will sometimes pass the time by playing with some apps. Here are a few I have found to combat…
body:
Occasionally while traveling, I will find myself with some down time and no internet access. Highly dependent upon my gadgets, I will sometimes pass the time by playing with some apps. Here are a few I have found to combat the B word (boredom).

1. Popbooth - it's free. I don't love that the logo is in the middle of the frame, but it was fun to play around with the different filters.

2. Tetris - what is not to love about this game?! It was even good when only available in green on my Gameboy.

3. Skitch - this is an iPad app that I use to draw on photos. And how I draw on my Instagrams.

4. Pet Salon SummerHD - I have no idea why this game is so addictive, but it is. And whoever told me about it months ago warned me too.

5. Flight Control - I still only have the free version. It's fun but sometimes it's stressful landing those planes, especially the jumbo jets.

Would love to hear what random apps you all love, especially for when there is not wifi available. Thanks!
